unavailable_msg:
The door is locked...
There appears to be an angry note from the HOA taped on the door.
first_dialog: Hello! If you're here to sell me some of that high powered weedkiller, I'm not interested. I heard it's not good for the environment and your health.
Oh, alright then. I was actually procrastinating on that actually. The HOA has been really getting on my case about that.
It's just that I've done some research online and it seems that mowing lawns might have some negative effects on the local ecosystem - especially with how it affects the local shrub demon population.
I didn't want to contribute to the problem, especially after the new weedkiller factory and data center opened nearby.
player_dialog: I'm here to mow your lawn!
first_job_offer: However, I'm tired of all of the angry letters and fines from the HOA. I also need to get my lawn mowed soon or I will get a $100 fine from those miserable geezers.
